belongs_to_collection.name: I Wanted My Wife to Acknowledge My Love, So I Left Her Alone with My Insatiable Junior for 3 Hours...

response.original_title: 愛を認めさせたくて妻と絶倫の後輩を2人きりにして3時間…抜かずの追撃中出し計16発で妻を奪われた僕のNTR話
response.overview: "I'm going out for three hours now, so try experiencing what it's like to be a pseudo-married couple with Megumi..." That one sentence I uttered to my subordinate, Nagano, ruined my life. I wanted to convey to my incompetent subordinate, who wasn't very responsible at work, a little bit of the sense of responsibility and happiness that comes with being married, so I created some time for him to be alone with my proud wife, Megumi... I had only expected them to enjoy drinks together while I was out, and I never imagined such a devastating situation would befall me...
response.title: JUR-589 I Wanted My Wife to Acknowledge My Love, So I Left Her Alone with My Insatiable Junior for 3 Hours... My NTR Story: How I Stole My Wife with 16 Continuous Creampies - Meguri
